text: In this sleek, modern space, I feel an acute awareness of design and purpose. The quiet, open expanse and the polished surfaces invoke thoughts of progress and inquiry. Moving to the exhibit adorned with bold colors and thought-provoking displays, my senses awaken—a reminder of humanity's restless curiosity and drive to innovate. Here, surrounded by evidence of research and development, I feel both small and inspired, contemplative about the interplay between individuals, knowledge, and technology.
